title: Scientific Apps are here (and more will be coming).
abstract: The world of Apps is now well upon us although the application of this tool was a bit slow in coming to the scientific community. In this column I will briefly take a look at some of the Apps now available that are applicable to biomedical research. I will restrict my coverage to the Apple format, not because I am totally an Apple user (my PC is a Dell) but only because I do not have an Android device.
